# Bash

> Executes shell commands in a sandboxed workspace directory. Only allowed commands can be run. No chaining with && or ;. Use the working_directory parameter instead of cd.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | system |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| command | string | yes | - | A single shell command to execute. Must start with an allowed command. No shell metacharacters (;|&$`><) allowed. Do NOT chain commands with && or ;. Use the working_directory parameter instead of 'cd'. |
| working_directory | string | no | - | Working directory for command execution. Use this instead of 'cd <dir> && <command>'. Must be within the workspace/ directory. |
| timeout | integer | no | 120 | Timeout in seconds (max 600). Default: 120. |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| allowed_commands | array[string] | - | Whitelist of allowed shell commands. If set, only these commands can be executed. |
| workspace_root | string | - | Root directory for command execution. Commands are restricted to this directory tree. |
| default_timeout | integer | 120 | Default timeout in seconds for command execution. |
| shell_mode | boolean | false | If true, allow shell metacharacters and use shell=True. Still enforces workspace sandbox. |

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "Bash"
```

### With config overrides

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - name: "Bash"
      config:
        default_timeout: 120
```

Returns unstructured text.
